texto: Seriously, we are in the midst of the convergence of voice and data and that is challenging the infrastructure of the telephone companies. There are huge commercial interests in the basic technology, but even more so in content delivery and control of content.
explicacao: Citação de Steve Crocker sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Seriously, we are in the midst of the convergence of voice and data and that is challenging the i…” articula vida, control, voice em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como voice e data.
